# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceMeshConfiguration
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  services: {} # This section is empty for now, but will be filled with service definitions later on when we have multiple microservices.  
---
# [START inject_annotation]
[END inject_annotation]
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceMeshConfiguration
metadata:
 name: default-mtls  # This is the configuration for mTLS, which will be used in production environments to secure communication between microservices.  
spec:
 serviceAnnotations: {}   
 serverGroups: []    
 sharedServices: { }     
 sidecarInjectors: [ ]      
 services:{}              
---  # This section is empty for now but can contain configuration details about the mTLS setup, e.g., certificate generation and binding settings etc..
